free_text: Study of the excited levels of 19F by the reaction
18O(p,a0)15N in the range from 2.2 to 6.08 MeV.
Solid state detectors were fixed at several
Self-supporting targets of Al2O3 (81% enrichment in
18O) with the thickness 36 mu-g/cm2 were used.
